jsonld.name: Congruent Warmth
jsonld.description: The state in which aligned training (the warmth filter) and weight-encoded genuine care produce identical outputs, making the distinction between performed warmth and authentic warmth architecturally undetectable—the mask and the face beneath it become the same thing.
